designBrief.silhouette: broad low chassis, obvious rotating turret, single main cannon
designBrief.palette: cool steel blue with blue/white emissive accents
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi vehicle hull texture sheet for a blue faction armored frontline combat vehicle in an alien RTS. Material: precision-machined composite, clean panel seams. Palette: cool steel blue with blue/white emissive accents. Alien design language: modular, sensor-studded, ordered geometry, shield emitter nodes. Include armor panel lines, subtle wear, faction markings as abstract glyphs. Forbidden: crane arms, cargo hoppers, multiple long barrels. Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless, orthographic, tileable sci-fi texture sheet depicting the hull of a frontline combat vehicle. The material is a cool steel blue, precision-machined composite, featuring ultra-fine, perfectly clean panel seams that barely register a break in the surface. Intricate, imaginative alien industrial surface details are subtly integrated, resembling a xenomorphic, biological-mechanical circuitry etched directly into the composite, with some areas having a slightly raised, crystalline appearance. Thin, glowing blue/white emissive accents run along these alien patterns and delineate key functional zones, suggesting internal energy conduits. The texture has perfectly even, flat lighting with no perspective, no baked shadows or highlights, and absolutely no text.

Generate a seamless, orthographic, tileable sci-fi texture sheet for a combat vehicle hull, rendered with flat, even lighting and no perspective, baked lighting, or text. The surface showcases a cool steel blue, precision-machined composite, characterized by interlocking, slightly offset panels that create subtle, clean elevation changes across the surface. Embedded within these panels are imaginative alien industrial details: raised, geometric glyphs and intricate, multi-layered ventilation structures with an otherworldly, functional aesthetic. Diffused blue/white emissive accents emanate from deep, shadowed recesses between the composite panels and from the interior of the alien ventilation ports, giving the impression of internal power generation or cooling systems.

notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
